name: freedom
description: iLink — Windows 局域网 P2P 加密通讯工具
author: iLink

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n VITE,ELECTRON -c cyan,green "vite" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.dev:second: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development FREEDOM_DATA_DIR=data-2 electron .
scripts.test: node test/ack-smoke.js && node test/room-smoke.js && node test/pathutil-smoke.js && node test/vault-smoke.js && node test/filetransfer-smoke.js && node test/avatar-smoke.js
